title: Rse config
description: Optional project-local configuration for the Rse CLI and loaded Rse plugins.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor IntelliSense.

publishOrder.description: Workspace package paths, in the order dler pub should publish them when --targets is omitted.

allowFreshScopes.description: Package names or scope globs allowed to bypass the safe-latest release-age gate.

blockDeprecated.description: Block npm versions marked as deprecated.

blockInstallScripts.description: Install-script policy for candidate package versions.

installScriptAllowlist.description: Package names allowed to keep install scripts when blockInstallScripts is unlessAllowlisted.

maxFallbackDepth.description: Maximum older stable versions checked by safe-latest.

minimumReleaseAgeDays.description: Minimum candidate release age in days.
